section.heading: Sunset

content.p: The authorities granted to the Secretary or the Director under this part shall expire on the date that is 7 years after November 15, 2021.

section.sourceCredit: (Pub. L. 107–296, title XXII, § 2238, as added Pub. L. 117–58, div. G, title VI, § 70602(a), Nov. 15, 2021, 135 Stat. 1272.)
